reference: Hello there. I had two magnetic resonance imaging scans that show that I have a ruptured disc, plus a piece of it that broke off and is now pressing on my nerve endings. I have been sent to see a surgeon next month, but my fear is that he will just dismiss me and tell me I do not need surgery. Isn't surgery the only solution at this point? I mean, with the broken-off piece and all?
text: The idea of active liberty was formulated by the judge Benjamin Cardozo, and now by Stephen Breyer.
